analysis.object: T672: Renormalization and Scale depth analysis

rg_flow.description: Renormalization group flow: controlled depth reduction EML-3 -> EML-2 at low energies
rg_flow.reason: RG flow is depth reduction: high-energy EML-3 oscillatory detail integrates out to EML-2 effective theory

asymptotic_freedom.description: Asymptotic freedom: coupling -> 0 at high energy; EML-3 weakens to EML-2 at UV
asymptotic_freedom.reason: Asymptotic freedom is EML-3->EML-2 at UV: strong oscillatory coupling weakens to perturbative measurement

confinement.description: Confinement: coupling -> inf at low energy; EML-2 -> EML-inf at IR; quarks trapped
confinement.reason: Confinement is EML-2->EML-inf at IR: coupling grows without bound; quarks EML-inf bound

fixed_points.description: RG fixed points: EML-3 exactly; scale invariant theories live at depth 3
fixed_points.reason: Fixed points are exactly EML-3: scale-invariant theory is EML-3 oscillatory with no scale measurement
